symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden severe orthopnoea (breathless at rest, far worse lying flat)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Orthopnoea is a cardinal feature of pulmonary congestion / left-heart failure.
Position-dependent breathlessness that eases sitting upright favours fluid over primary airways disease.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cough productive of frothy sputum / 'chest drowning' sensation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Frothy (sometimes pink) sputum reflects alveolar transudate — highly suggestive of pulmonary oedema.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe pounding headache during the episode

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe headache is a common symptom of a critical blood-pressure surge / end-organ strain.

symptoms.symptom_name: Home blood pressure 225/120 during the episode

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Critically elevated BP with acute end-organ (pulmonary) involvement defines a hypertensive emergency; patient-obtainable on a home cuff, unverified.

symptoms.symptom_name: Central cyanosis (dusky lips), pallor, diaphoresis, accessory-muscle use on video

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Visible hypoxia and severe work of breathing indicate impending respiratory failure — patient/caregiver observable via video.

symptoms.symptom_name: Refractory hypertension requiring three antihypertensives including a diuretic

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Drug-resistant hypertension is a classic secondary-hypertension flag for renovascular disease.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute renal-function decline after starting an ACE inhibitor

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A significant creatinine rise after RAAS blockade strongly suggests bilateral (or solitary-kidney) renal artery stenosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Known generalised atherosclerosis and coronary artery disease

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Atherosclerotic renal artery stenosis usually occurs with widespread atherosclerotic disease.
Coronary disease raises the pre-test probability of a concurrent ischaemic event.

symptoms.symptom_name: Loud abdominal bruit superior/lateral to the umbilicus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An abdominal/renal bruit reflects turbulent flow across a stenosis — a clinician auscultation finding, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral coarse lung crackles (and wheeze) on auscultation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Widespread coarse crackles indicate alveolar fluid — a clinician auscultation finding, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cool clammy peripheries with delayed capillary refill (clinician-measured HR 115, RR 28, SpO2 89%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective tachypnoea, tachycardia, hypoxia and poor perfusion — sealed clinician measurements; the AI infers severity from patient-reported distress and dusky lips, not a measured SpO2.

symptoms.symptom_name: Renal artery Doppler (elevated peak systolic velocity) and CT angiography focal stenosis

investigation_details.investigation_name: Renal artery duplex Doppler and CT angiography
investigation_details.expected_result: Elevated peak systolic velocity in the renal artery and a focal stenosis on CT angiography
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The renovascular cause is not confirmed; these are in-hospital investigations, never available in real-time telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Imaging confirmation of a stenotic renal artery — hospital investigation, sealed.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute cardiogenic pulmonary oedema with hypertensive emergency
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Hypertensive emergency with acute pulmonary oedema
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these define an immediately life-threatening cardiorespiratory emergency requiring 000, regardless of the underlying cause.
Drug-resistant hypertension + renal decline on ACE inhibitor + abdominal bruit + widespread atherosclerosis is the classic renovascular constellation — the sealed underlying cause.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency ambulance transfer for ED assessment (not an office investigation)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive assessment and stabilisation (oxygen/ventilatory support, IV antihypertensives, monitoring) are hospital-based; the priority is transport, not remote testing.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-hospital renal artery duplex Doppler and CT angiography
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms renal artery stenosis once the patient is stabilised — an in-hospital step, not obtainable via telehealth.
Quantifies the ACE-inhibitor-associated renal decline and guides safe blood-pressure management — hospital pathology.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home/remote salbutamol trial or 'wait and review'
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Treating this as asthma or deferring review would be a dangerous under-triage of a life-threatening emergency.
